# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

---
# Declarative configuration file for Kong API Gateway

services:
  - name: microservice-1
    url: http://localhost:8001/api/v1

  - name: microservice-2
    url: http://localhost:8002/api/v2

routes:
  - name: route-1
    service: microservice-1
    path_handling: "v1"
    methods: ["GET"]
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: true
    tags: ["api", "microservice-1"]

  - name: route-2
    service: microservice-2
    path_handling: "v2"
    methods: ["POST"]
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: true
    tags: ["api", "microservice-2"]

upstreams:
  - name: upstream-1
    targets:
      - url: http://localhost:8001/api/v1
        weight: 1
      - url: http://localhost:8002/api/v2
        weight: 1
    load_balancing: "round_robin"
